About: It is about water sports toys.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the brand name Waboba.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a Lycra cover.
It consists of rubber or neoprene with gel material and polyurethane and Lycra jacket.
It consists of water absorbing high-density materials.
It consists of Ultra Suede single seam cover and beaded fill with other water absorbing high-density materials.
HasA: It has a Lycra cover.
It has a spherical shape.
It has fluid high-density particulate contents.
It has patent pending designs for "high density" or "balanced density " materials.
It has a collapsing bag or sack like a foot bag.
It has an Ultra Suede single seam cover.
It has beaded fill with other water absorbing high-density materials.
It has a low profile skip pattern.
It has a bean bag-like design.
It has a low skip pattern.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by bouncing on the water.
It is characterized by being usually round.
It is characterized by having a Lycra cover.
It is characterized by skipping across the water.
It is characterized by having little friction on the water.
It is characterized by being relatively small in size and density.
It is characterized by bouncing and gliding in a straight line on the water surface.
It is characterized by being palm-sized.
It is characterized by being able to travel a great distance.
It is characterized by being able to travel as fast as they can be thrown.
HeldIn: It was held in a body of water.
It was held in shallow water.
It was held in deep water.
It was held in special pools with goals and water courts.
InventedBy: It was invented by Jan Von Heland.
IsA: It is a water sports toy.
It is a high-performance water bag.

It is a water-absorbing collapsing water bag.

It is a foot bag.

It is known as water absorbing bags.
It is known as Hacky Sack.
KnownFor: It is known for bouncing on water.
It is known for being filled with fluid.
It is known for skipping and bouncing on the water surface.
It is known for its unique water skimming properties.
It is known for its low skip profile.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the US market.

It occurred overseas.
